title: Phase 5A: Dispatch module - UI (order board, truck planner, route map, checklist, carryover)
description: Build dispatch UI: order board page (filterable DataTable + Kanban hybrid), truck planner with drag-and-drop and capacity visualization, route map with Leaflet, dispatch checklist dialog, delayed order carryover queue, dispatch log, and truck capacity visualizer.
steps: Create src/app/(dashboard)/dispatch/page.tsx with order board (DataTable + Kanban hybrid view)
Implement filters: status, delivery type, branch, date, priority, has-exceptions
Create src/components/dispatch/truck-planner.tsx with drag-and-drop stop assignment
Include capacity visualization bars (weight, pieces, bundles, length)
Create src/components/dispatch/route-map.tsx with Leaflet map, stop markers, route polyline, zone overlays
Create src/components/dispatch/carryover-queue.tsx with delayed order carryover management
Create src/app/(dashboard)/dispatch/log/page.tsx with dispatch log history
Create src/components/dispatch/capacity-bar.tsx with truck capacity visualizer
